title: Add /assign command GitHub Action
body:
Enable community members to self-assign issues by commenting /assign. This workflow uses the GitHub API to assign any user, not just collaborators.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read and understood our contributing guidelines

that all your commits are signed with `git commit -s`.
-->

comments.body: While I understand the concern, we are hosting a Contribfest where I am telling folks to /assign issues, and Buildah is one of the repos - so can we merge this now and fix later?

> should this be a reusable action from podman? Duplicating this in each repo means we need to update many repos at once?

yes we should.
